caption:
GoHighLevel just bundled Voice AI, Conversation AI, and an AI receptionist into one plan.

Most shops still send after-hours calls to voicemail. Weekend leads wait until Monday to hear back.

Speed only converts if the system behind it works. An AI that answers in one ring with no script, no handoff point, and no CRM sync still loses the lead.

Before you turn on any AI answering tool, lock three things: the exact questions it asks every caller, the moment it hands off to a person, and where the answer lands, straight into your calendar.

Lead response research ties answers under 5 minutes to close rates roughly double those of slower follow-up. Any tool you add has to hit that number.

Want a call and chat answering system built around your actual sales process?

DM "ANSWER"

#speedtolead #missedcalltextback #homeservices #crmautomation #serviceindustry
rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences, and this interprets a genuinely new, uncovered CRM/AI platform shift through the account's core speed-to-lead lens with a concrete pre-launch checklist instead of a generic feature recap.
